critical_issues.title: Extreme Kitchen Processing Delays
critical_issues.root_cause: Orders taking abnormally long to complete - one order took 167.85 mins and another took 20,021 mins (13.9 days). Orders stuck in 'pending' and 'sent_to_kitchen' status without completion.
critical_issues.impact: 60% of orders incomplete, severe customer dissatisfaction
critical_issues.recommendation: Immediately investigate order fulfillment workflow. Implement kitchen display system with alerts for orders exceeding 30 minutes. Train staff on order status updates. Review and fix order completion process in POS system.

critical_issues.title: All Inventory Items Expired
critical_issues.root_cause: All 25 inventory items show negative days_to_expiry (ranging from -198 to -371 days), indicating entire stock expired between 6 months to 1 year ago. Data suggests inventory management system failure or complete operational shutdown.
critical_issues.impact: ₹72,145 total expired stock value, health hazard risk
critical_issues.recommendation: Immediately dispose all expired inventory following food safety protocols. Conduct full inventory audit and fresh procurement. Implement automated expiry tracking with weekly alerts. Review why inventory wasn't rotated for 6+ months.

critical_issues.title: Low Order Volume and Revenue
critical_issues.root_cause: Only 5 orders in 31-day period (0.16 orders/day). This indicates either new restaurant launch, severe operational issues, or data collection problems.
critical_issues.impact: ₹210,000 revenue for month, critically low throughput
critical_issues.recommendation: Investigate root cause of low order volume. If operational: launch marketing campaign, review pricing strategy, enhance menu offerings. If data issue: audit POS system data capture. Analyze customer traffic patterns and competitive landscape.

critical_issues.title: Orders Stuck Without Completion
critical_issues.root_cause: 3 out of 5 orders (60%) remain incomplete with status 'in_progress' or 'sent_to_kitchen', indicating workflow bottlenecks or staff not closing orders in system.
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement mandatory order closure protocol. Set up automatic alerts for orders open >2 hours. Retrain staff on POS order completion workflow. Add supervisor review of all open orders at end of each shift.

critical_issues.title: Zero Fresh Stock Available
critical_issues.root_cause: All perishable items (proteins, dairy, vegetables, fruits) expired months ago with no fresh procurement recorded. Critical ingredients unavailable for menu items.
critical_issues.impact: Unable to fulfill menu items, operational shutdown risk
critical_issues.recommendation: Emergency procurement of all perishable items needed for active menu. Establish daily/weekly procurement schedule based on par levels. Implement vendor contracts with reliable delivery schedules. Set reorder points at current levels.

critical_issues.title: Single Staff Member Handling All Orders
critical_issues.root_cause: All 5 orders assigned to same staff_id (696e4a1e977ce5e7bf02469a), indicating either single-person operation or staff assignment system failure.
critical_issues.impact: Service bottleneck, burnout risk, quality issues
critical_issues.recommendation: If understaffed: hire additional kitchen and service staff immediately. If system issue: implement proper staff assignment rotation in POS. Ensure minimum 2-3 staff per shift for adequate coverage and quality control.
